dql_query_get_logs.name: dql_query_get_logs

input.query:
fetch logs, from: now()-10min
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "arc-store"
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" OR contains(lower(content), "exception") OR contains(lower(content), "error")
| sort timestamp desc
| fields timestamp, k8s.pod.name, content, loglevel
| limit 10

dql_query_get_logs.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.
